message:
fix(web): prevent scroll flicker from post-processing artifacts and iOS scroll containment

Two key fixes for scroll rendering issues:

1. Post-processing artifact prevention in scroll blit:
   - Track whether the previous frame had post-processing (scanlines, glow) applied
   - Skip scroll blit when transitioning from post-processed to scrolling state
   - Forces clean full redraw on first scroll frame after static viewing
   - Prevents visual inconsistency where blitted content has effects but new rows don't

2. iOS/WebKit scroll containment fix (styles.css):
   - Use minmax(0, 1fr) instead of bare 1fr for grid middle track
   - Add explicit height (100vh/dvh) to app-shell with overflow:hidden
   - Add min-height: 0 to app-body to constrain within grid track
   - Prevents iOS from scrolling the document body instead of the app container
   - Eliminates viewport reflows that triggered canvas resizes and jank

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
